title: Equilibrium Condition
text: F $$=$$ -dU/dx $$=$$ $$0$$, so equilibrium happens wherever U has zero slope (min, max, or flat).

title: At a Local Minimum
text: Small displacements in either direction increase U and thus produce a restoring force back toward the minimum.

title: Conclude
text: A local minimum of U(x) is a stable equilibrium.
